agents.name: Rex
agents.note:
Session 113 -- US-241 SHIPPED passes:true (Sprint 19 8/8 COMPLETE). B-047 US-A versioning prerequisite landed; Sprint 20+ self-update stories (US-B/C/D) now have a stable comparison key from US-A onward. SHAPE: deploy/RELEASE_VERSION (committed, JSON with {version, description}) + per-tier .deploy-version (JSON with {version, releasedAt, gitHash, description}; gitHash short-hash; releasedAt UTC ISO-8601-Z). SemVer V..

with capital V required. Seed V0.18.0 per CIO directive 2026-04-29. PI .deploy-version: ${PI_PATH}/.deploy-version. SERVER .deploy-version: ${PROJECT}/.deploy-version. HELPERS: scripts/version_helpers.py exposes parseVersion / bumpVersion (major resets minor+patch / minor resets patch) / validateRelease (400-char description cap + T...Z timestamp regex + missing-field detection) / readDeployVersion (None on missing/malformed/invalid for graceful B-047 US-B/C consumption) / composeReleaseRecord. CLI 'compose-record' subcommand is the seam the bash deploy scripts shell out to (single source of JSON shape, no duplicated heredocs). DEPLOY-PI step_write_deploy_version() runs after step_install_eclipse_obd_unit + before step_restart_service; idempotent overwrite with refreshed releasedAt; gitHash via 'git -C $REPO_ROOT rev-parse --short HEAD' with 'unknown' fallback. DEPLOY-SERVER step 5.5 between cutover (step 5) and systemctl restart (step 6). MISSING-HELPER GATE: deploy-pi.sh checks both scripts/version_helpers.py + deploy/RELEASE_VERSION exist at $REPO_ROOT before composing; warns + skips if either absent (preserves test_deploy_pi.sh offline-safe contract since the smoke test copies only deploy/ to a tmp tree). MID-SESSION REGRESSION: test 5+6 of test_deploy_pi.sh failed exit=8 (my hard-exit when version_helpers missing); root-caused via tail -80 of bash smoke; option (a) defensive missing-helper gate was correct fix per CIO Q1 / Scope Fence (the broken file IS in scope); option (b) widening the smoke test would have been out-of-scope. Files actually touched (7): deploy/RELEASE_VERSION (NEW), deploy/deploy-pi.sh, deploy/deploy-server.sh, scripts/version_helpers.py (NEW 286 lines), tests/deploy/test_release_versioning.py (NEW 423 lines, 48 tests across 9 classes), specs/architecture.md (new subsection at end of SECTION-11), docs/testing.md (new 'Release Versioning + Deploy Records' section + modification history). Verification: pytest tests/deploy/test_release_versioning.py 48/48 passed; bash tests/deploy/test_deploy_pi.sh 29/29 PASS (post-gate); pytest tests/ -m 'not slow' 3532 passed 17 skipped 0 failures (13:39); ruff scripts/version_helpers.py + tests/deploy/test_release_versioning.py clean (NOT .sh -- ruff doesn't lint shell, story verification command listed .sh files but that's the documented gotcha); sprint_lint 0 errors / 27 warnings (all pre-existing US-234..240 sizing + US-241 expected sizing -- informational per feedback_pm_sprint_contract_calibration). EXECUTE NOT RUN -- script ships dry-run-validated; CIO/PM deploy at sprint close. PROMISE TAG: COMPLETE (Sprint 19 8/8 all passes:true). NEXT-SESSION HANDOFF: Sprint 19 closed. Awaiting Sprint 20 PM-grooming. B-047 US-B (server /api/v1/version endpoint, M) + US-C (Pi self-update on home-net reconnect, M) + US-D (release registry tarballs, M) are sequenced for Sprint 20+. The .deploy-version shape is locked; do NOT add fields without coordinating with US-B/C/D. SESSION 113 KEY LEARNINGS: (1) helper-CLI seam pattern between bash deploy scripts and Python validation (compose-X subcommand); (2) missing-helper warn-and-skip gate pattern for deploy steps that depend on NEW co-shipped helper files; (3) mid-session smoke-test regression triage discipline -- read the smoke test FIRST then decide whether to make the new step robust (preferred) or widen the test (only if test was wrong); (4) bumpVersion SemVer-reset semantics need explicit test cases not prose; (5) stable-API discipline from US-A onward for multi-story features (B-047 contract locked from US-241). Last session: 'Session 112 -- US-240 SHIPPED passes:true (Sprint 19 7/8) ... PROMISE TAG: PARTIAL_BLOCKED'.
